sections.paragraph: , מְכוּרָה suff. מְכוּרָתָם Eze 29:14 plur. מְכֹרֹתַיִךְ ibid. 16:3 מְכֻרֹתַיִךְ ibid. 21:35, f., origin, nativity of any one, properly, digging out, mine, a place where metals are dug out, from the root כּוּר No. 1, used in this sense by a figure taken from metals (compare Isa 51:1); like the Germ. Abftammung, by a similar figure taken from plants. Arab. ىَوْرُ a digging; also the nature, quality of any one.
